caption: The video features a presentation by Alejandro Saucedo, who is introduced as the CTO of Exponential Technologies, Chairman of The Institute for Ethical AI & ML, Fellow (AI, Data & ML) at The RSA, and Advisor for TeensInAI.com initiative. The setting appears to be a conference or seminar, specifically EuroPython in Edinburgh from July 23-29, 2018. Alejandro is seen speaking at a podium, gesturing with his hands as he explains concepts related to "Industrial Machine Learning." The background screen displays his name, title, and contact information, emphasizing his expertise and roles in the field of artificial intelligence and machine learning. The presentation likely delves into the applications and implications of industrial machine learning, targeting an audience interested in technology and data science.
